commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Thereof, whatever the earth can produce, particularly wheat The fruits of heaven, (ver. 13,) may denote such as grew on trees. (Calmet)
Bush; God, who appeared to Moses. (Haydock)
Nazarite. See the note on Genesis xlix. 26. (Challoner)
Joseph was distinguished by God, by his father, and by the king of Egypt, in a particular manner. The high priest was the Nasir in the house of God, (Leviticus xxi. 12,) as Joseph ws the chief officer, at the court of Pharao. The eastern kings still give this title to their prime minister. (Chardin. Perse. T. ii. 5, p. 136.)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: The Nazarite: See the note on Gen. 49. 26.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
